message:
feat(diff-snapshot): add operational telemetry counters to DiffSnapshotEngine [ft-3kxe.14]

Add DiffSnapshotTelemetry with 6 counters (diffs_captured, clean_skips,
auto_compactions, manual_compactions, total_diff_entries, layout_diffs)
wired into capture_diff() and compact(). Plain u64 since engine uses &mut self.

Includes proptest_diff_snapshot_telemetry.rs with 9 unit tests and 5
property tests covering monotonicity, auto-compaction at limits, clean
skip counting, and serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
